description: PeopleDesk is an internal HR web application deployed on AWS. Staff sign in through Okta SSO. The employee database is encrypted at rest and all traffic uses TLS 1.3. A WAF fronts the application. An LLM feature summarizes an employee's records on request.

observed_unmatched.name: PII display tokenization
observed_unmatched.description: masks identifiers on screen after the model call
